SEARCH

Class WordList

java.lang.Object
WordList
public class WordList extends Object
Holds a list of unique Words built from a raw token array, with stop words excluded. Lab 5 adds three static stream-based methods: distinctWordsCount(), shortWordsCount(), and mostFrequentByLetter().
Version:
3/3/26
Author:
Ali Kablanbek

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    WordList(ArrayList<String> stopWords, String[] tokens)
    Builds the WordList from a token array.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • WordList

      public WordList(ArrayList<String> stopWords, String[] tokens)
      Builds the WordList from a token array. Each token is skipped if it is empty or a stop word; otherwise it is added as a new Word or its existing entry is incremented.
      Parameters:
      stopWords - function words to exclude (may be mixed-case)
      tokens - lowercase word tokens from the source text

  • Method Details

    • getWordFrequency

      public ArrayList<Word> getWordFrequency()
      Returns:
      the full list of Words in insertion order

    • search

      public int search(String w)
      Linear search for a word string.
      Returns:
      index of the matching Word, or -1 if not found

    • getMostFrequent

      public Word getMostFrequent()
      Returns the most frequent Word using a single linear scan with compareTo().
      Returns:
      the highest-frequency Word, or null if the list is empty

    • topKMostFrequent

      public Word[] topKMostFrequent(int k)
      Returns the top k most frequent Words in descending order without sorting. Uses repeated selection with a boolean used-flag array (O(k*n)). If k > list size, the array is capped at list size with no null padding.
      Parameters:
      k - number of top words to return

    • distinctWordsCount

      public static long distinctWordsCount(String[] tokens)
      Counts the number of distinct, non-empty strings in the token array. Stream pipeline: filter empty → distinct → count.
      Parameters:
      tokens - raw token array from String.split()
      Returns:
      number of distinct non-empty tokens

    • shortWordsCount

      public static long shortWordsCount(String[] tokens, int threshold)
      Counts distinct strings of length at most threshold. Stream pipeline: filter empty → filter by length → distinct → count.
      Parameters:
      tokens - raw token array from String.split()
      threshold - maximum word length to include (must be >= 0)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if threshold is negative

    • mostFrequentByLetter

      public static Word mostFrequentByLetter(WordList wl, char letter)
      Returns the most frequent Word starting with letter using filter() and max(). orElse(null) handles the case where no matching word exists.
      Parameters:
      wl - the WordList to search
      letter - starting character to filter on (case-sensitive)
      Returns:
      the most frequent matching Word, or null if none found
